verse_text: on the twenty-fourth day of the sixth month, in the second year of King Darius.

pericope.title: The Future Glory of the New Temple

links.context: The temple will be rebuilt, but not as it was before. The second temple, not as glorious, was completed in approximately 515 BC (see [[HAG.1:1]]-15).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
